chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-324 of 2019 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.2899/2019 2. For orders on MA No.2900/2019 3. For hearing of bail application 10-06-2019 Mr. Bakhshan Khan, Advocate for the applicant.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Applicants Allahwasayo, Saifullah and Khadim all by caste Mahar have approached this court for grant of protective bail in Crime No.25/2019, u/s 337-(i), 337-F(i), 353, 147 and 148 PPC, registered at Police Station Chak District Shikarpur. Learned counsel for the applicants states at the bar that applicants are ready and willing to surrender before the learned trial court for grant of pre- arrest bail as they have grave apprehension that if they approach the learned trial court, they shall be arrested in the aforesaid crime, therefore they have directly approached this court. In view of the above facts and circumstances of the case I am of the opinion that the applicants have made out a case for grant of protective bail, the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 10 days to surrender before the learned trial court, upon furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-(rupees thirty thousands) each and P.R bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect expiry of aforesaid period of whenever applicants appear before the concerned Court whichever is earlier. Instant bail application stands disposed of in the above terms.

This order shall cease to have its effect expiry of aforesaid period of whenever applicants appear before the concerned Court whichever is earlier. Instant bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE
